labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 622110 ($423,236,584,804) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 622110 ($1,262,818,896,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1580 (margins.json[62]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)); revenue/employee $223,601 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 622110); class <5: 273 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,209,125 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $191,042 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 22 firms, avg revenue/firm $5,364,227 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $847,548 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 7 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,929,429 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $304,850 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 179 firms, avg revenue/firm $12,611,380 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $1,992,598 -> IN $1-10M band; class 100-499: 951 firms, avg revenue/firm $38,340,453 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $6,057,792 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 1,141 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,072,426,011 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $169,443,310 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 1,130
n_band.margin_source: Damodaran Jan 2026: Hospitals/Healthcare Facilities EBITDA/Sales 15.80% (closest named bucket for provider economics; public support-services bucket at 3.87% reflects a different business model)
